ItacAcademyItem.Name: Acuti (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.EmblemDescription: Sun on which are fixed the eyes of two eagles
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Patrons of the Acuti Academy were Procuratori di San Marco d`Ultra. the Academy used to meet in the convent of Niccolo` de` Frari. See Michele Battigia, Delle Accademie veneziane (1826).
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
